highlights.summary: Trio v0.8.2 patch release: OmnipodKit becomes the sole Omnipod driver (legacy OmniBLE/OmniKit removed); Live Activity improvements including rendering active temp targets as a green band with a named badge and fixing indefinite-override rendering; watch connectivity/back-sync performance fixes to reduce stale-data hangups; Meals chart fix so today's carbs/fat/protein macros appear correctly; CI APP_DEV_VERSION increments.
highlights.userFacingImpact: Users may see the Omnipod selection simplified to a single "All Omnipod Types"/OmnipodKit entry in pump/onboarding flows; Live Activity lock‑screen/chart will display active temp targets as a green band with a named badge and indefinite overrides should render correctly instead of collapsing; watch app/back-sync should recover from long staleness faster and avoid getting stuck during processing; the Meals statistics view will show today's macros correctly. APP_DEV_VERSION bumps are CI/dev configuration changes.

items.summary: Trio v0.8.2 patch release: OmnipodKit becomes the sole Omnipod driver (legacy OmniBLE/OmniKit removed); Live Activity improvements including rendering active temp targets as a green band with a named badge and fixing indefinite-override rendering; watch connectivity/back-sync performance fixes to reduce stale-data hangups; Meals chart fix so today's carbs/fat/protein macros appear correctly; CI APP_DEV_VERSION increments.
items.userFacingImpact: Users may see the Omnipod selection simplified to a single "All Omnipod Types"/OmnipodKit entry in pump/onboarding flows; Live Activity lock‑screen/chart will display active temp targets as a green band with a named badge and indefinite overrides should render correctly instead of collapsing; watch app/back-sync should recover from long staleness faster and avoid getting stuck during processing; the Meals statistics view will show today's macros correctly. APP_DEV_VERSION bumps are CI/dev configuration changes.

items.summary: Adds Live Activity lock‑screen support for active temp targets: introduces TempTargetData and DataManager fetch plumbing, extends Activity ContentState with temp target fields, publishes tempTarget in LiveActivityData, adds a colored temp target badge and chart RuleMark, includes LoopGreen styling, refactors fetch helper, repositions badges to the top‑leading overlay, and stops extending the chart X‑axis two hours for active overrides/temp targets.
items.userFacingImpact: When a temp target is active, the Live Activity lock‑screen widget will show a colored temp target badge with the target name and draw the temp target region on the chart; this badge stacks with the existing override badge if both are active. Badges were moved to the left side of the chart and the chart end no longer extends two hours into the future when an override or temp target is active.

sources.title: gordolio/Trio#1180: Add temp target display to live activity lock screen widget
nightscout/Trio#1180: Add temp target display to live activity lock screen widget
Add temp target display to live activity lock screen widget
Move override/temp target badges to left side of chart; remove graph compression
Refactor fetchAndMapTempTarget/Override into generic fetchAndMapLatest helper
Add missing CoreData import to LiveActivity DataManager

items.summary: Unifies WatchConnectivity incoming paths into a single handler and adds freshness and monotonicity guards: centralizes didReceiveMessage/didReceiveUserInfo handling, drops snapshots older than ~15 minutes, persists and checks a latest-date to deduplicate non-new snapshots, stamps outgoing phone-sent snapshots with Date() to ensure newer timestamps, and preserves ack/recommended-bolus handling outside the staleness gate.
items.userFacingImpact: Incoming watch-state payloads older than ~15 minutes will be ignored (reducing processing of backlogged/stale messages); duplicate or non-new snapshots will be skipped via the persisted monotonic timestamp; phone-initiated re-pushes are stamped with the current time so they are less likely to be silenced. Ack and recommended-bolus messages continue to be handled without the staleness gate. Runtime verification/QA is recommended.

sources.title: gordolio/Trio#1190: Fix watch app back-sync after long staleness
nightscout/Trio#1190: Fix watch app back-sync after long staleness

Fix watch app back-sync after long staleness * Unify didReceiveMessage + didReceiveUserInfo through one handleIncomingWatchStatePayload * Add guard on wall-clock staleness, then perform monotonicity dedupe * Add state.date with Date() at send time, not build time * Drop lastSent < state.date guard * Watch-requested re-pushes no longer get silenced when no CGM tick has bumped the build-time date Potentially addresses #1162
Change variable name for clarity, add time unit ('inMinutes')

includedPullRequests.title: Add temp target display to live activity lock screen widget
includedPullRequests.body: When a temp target is active, an orange badge showing the temp target name appears in the top right corner of the widget. Both badges stack vertically if an override and a temp target are active at the same time. I have tried to mirror the existing Override code pattern. PS: screen shots contain an issue that has been fixed already, where the TT badge does not make the graph shift to the left. | Screenshots | Screenshots | |--------|--------| | | | | | |

includedPullRequests.title: Fix watch app back-sync after long staleness
includedPullRequests.body:
* Unify didReceiveMessage + didReceiveUserInfo through one handleIncomingWatchStatePayload
* Add guard on wall-clock staleness, then perform monotonicity dedupe
* Add state.date with Date() at send time, not build time
* Drop lastSent < state.date guard
* Watch-requested re-pushes no longer get silenced when no CGM tick has bumped the build-time date Potentially addresses #1162

includedPullRequests.title: Trio v0.8.2 patch release
includedPullRequests.body:
## What's Changed At A Glance

- **OmnipodKit is now the sole Omnipod driver** — OmniBLE and OmniKit submodules removed; "All Omnipod Types" is the only Omnipod entry in Add Pump and Onboarding
- **Live Activity Enhancements / Fixes:**
   -  Temp target on chart — active temp targets now render as a green band on the Live Activity chart, with a named badge alongside the override badge
   - Ondefinite override fix — overrides with no set duration no longer collapse the chart's rule mark to the current moment
   - COB label and widget string fixes — corrected the COB string and localized all widget item labels
- **Watch connectivity fix** — massively improve watch performance; stale data on watch now updates in just a moment vs. getting stuck during processing.
- **Fix Stats Meals showing zero macros for current day** — today's carbs, fat, and protein now always appear correctly in the Meals chart
---

## Full List of PRs in `0.8.2`

| PR | Title | Author |
|---|---|---|
| [#1180](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1180) | Add temp target display to Live Activity lock screen widget | [@t1dude](https://github.com/t1dude) |
| [#1182](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1182) | Update CODEOWNERS: add @marionbarker and @kingst | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1184](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1184) | Fix COB string, localize Live Activity widget item labels | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1188](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1188) | Fix Stats Meals showing zero macros for current day | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1190](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1190) | Fix watch app back-sync after long staleness | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |
| [#1192](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1192) | Fix indefinite override not drawn in Live Activity chart | [@t1dude](https://github.com/t1dude) |
| [#1200](https://github.com/nightscout/Trio/pull/1200) | Remove Legacy Omnipod Submodules (OmniKit, OmniBLE) | [@dnzxy](https://github.com/dnzxy) |

---

## Contributors

@dnzxy @t1dude @marv-out
